## Checklist

- [ ] My change is focused and contains no unrelated generated files.
- [ ] I built the project with `Build.ps1 -SkipDesktopCopy` without new warnings.
- [ ] I manually tested the affected behavior on Windows using a harmless target.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-visible behavior changes.
- [ ] I considered global-hotkey, cancellation, input-validation, and multi-monitor effects where relevant.
- [ ] I removed passwords, tokens, personal data, and other sensitive information.
- [ ] I agree that my contribution is licensed under the MIT License.
